headline: Comcast Completes Network Expansion to More Than 5,200 Homes and Businesses in East Nottingham and Oxford Borough
summary: TREVOSE, Pa., March 30, 2026--Comcast has expanded its network to more than 5,200 homes and businesses across East Nottingham and Oxford Borough, bringing reliable, multi-gigabit, symmetrical Internet from America’s smartest and most reliable converged network. The company recently completed construction in East Nottingham, and work in Oxford Borough is nearing completion. Xfinity brings Internet, mobile, entertainment, and smart home services into one simple, seamless solution – giving customer
